exampleSentencesTranslated: The trip with his family was wonderful and memorable.
I think this dish is wonderful, you should try it once.
Thank you for helping me, you are wonderful!
notes_md:
**Tuyệt vời** means *wonderful*, *great*, or *awesome* — something really good that makes you feel happy or impressed.

It’s an adjective, so it describes things like experiences, people, food, ideas, weather, news, etc. It usually comes after the noun it describes (một bộ phim tuyệt vời) or after “thật/rất” to make it stronger. You can also use it alone as a reaction, like saying “Awesome!”

Close synonyms: **xuất sắc** (more like “excellent,” a bit formal), **tuyệt hảo** (very perfect, stronger). Opposite: **tệ** (bad).
notes:
Tuyệt vời means wonderful, great, or awesome — something really good that makes you feel happy or impressed.

It’s an adjective, so it describes things like experiences, people, food, ideas, weather, news, etc. It usually comes after the noun it describes (một bộ phim tuyệt vời) or after “thật/rất” to make it stronger. You can also use it alone as a reaction, like saying “Awesome!”

Close synonyms: xuất sắc (more like “excellent,” a bit formal), tuyệt hảo (very perfect, stronger). Opposite: tệ (bad).
exampleSentences: Chuyến du lịch của anh với gia đình thật tuyệt vời và đáng nhớ.
Em nghĩ món ăn này tuyệt vời, anh nên thử một lần.
Cảm ơn chị đã giúp em, chị thật tuyệt vời!

definitions.en: Used to describe something that is very good, excellent, or impressive.
definitions.vi: Diễn tả điều gì đó rất tốt, rất đẹp hoặc làm người ta hài lòng.

example.vi: Bữa tiệc hôm qua thật tuyệt vời.
